rules.consumes_emits_discipline: Consumes/emits alone must not create hard_dependency unless phase-doc Required dependencies, business logic, ADL, activation/lifecycle, billing/evidence, or manual decision provides a hard basis.
rules.correct_example: 6A.08 hard-depends on 6A.07 because 6A.07 is in Required dependencies; consumes/emits only supports the reason.
rules.incorrect_example: Do not infer Audit Log hard-depends on Event Bus merely from emitted/consumed evidence elsewhere.
rules.foundry_manifest_dependency_target: service_manifest_contract is the default manifest traceability target for activatable/configurable service-like Phase 6A boundaries.
rules.adl_004_scope: ADL-004 is Phase 6A relevant through Communication Gateway / Global Opt-Out.
rules.adl_016_scope: ADL-016 is deferred_to_phase_6b_gl and is not represented as a Phase 6A seed or sub-surface.

Backup engine depends on object metadata and content hashes owned by SVFS object store.
Image pipeline consumes stored objects and produces image variants under storage evidence.
ADL-006 deletion lifecycle separates soft delete from staged permanent deletion.
ADL-001/002 event delivery is fed by transactional outbox messages.
DLQ/admin inspection and replay depends on event delivery failures.
Saga orchestration requires transactional outbox for durable state/event publication.
Saga orchestration requires event bus delivery.
Saga orchestration needs DLQ visibility for failed delivery/replay.
Compensation dispatcher depends on saga orchestration records.
Terminal-state handling depends on saga orchestration lifecycle.
Billing dimensions reference pricing table with effective dates.
Evidence aggregation feeds measurement registry and billing evidence.
Projected cost calculator is pricing-table-only and does not mutate spend.
Budget caps enforce measured billing dimensions.
Prepaid balance primitives require billing dimension measurement.
Service manifest contract is registered under Foundry runtime authority.
Manifest validation requires the manifest contract.
Activation dependency resolution starts from validated manifests.
Deactivation blocking evaluates active dependency resolution.
Version pin and rollback are manifest-governed lifecycle controls.
Capability registration is declared by service manifests.
Pricing reference registration is declared by service manifests.
Event subscription registration is declared by service manifests.
Route/interface registration is declared by service manifests.
Frontend chunk registration is declared by service manifests.
ADL-004 opt-out is enforced at person/contact/channel scope.
ADL-004 requires outbound communication to enforce global opt-out.
Provider circuit breaker is a gateway safety control and does not replace opt-out.
Rate-limit enforcement is a gateway safety control and does not replace opt-out.
Webhook management requires idempotency/retry boundary for provider retries.
